consignor.certificate_value: Cellmark AB Box 11927 SE404 39, GÖTEBORG Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: CELLMARK AB Lilla Bommen 3C BOX 11927 404 39 GOTHENBURG SWEDEN
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Cellmark AB' from certificate detected exactly in invoice in header and address blocks with allowed normalizations such as abbreviation of 'Box', street address variation, and case normalization. The countries 'Sweden' match exactly. No conflicting parties found. Rules 4.1.0 (Koncernstruktur), 4.1.3.6 (Förkortning av juridisk bolagsform), and 4.1.4 (Landkontroll) confirm the match.

consignee.certificate_value: FOR/NOTIFY PARTY: ELITE PAPER INDUSTRY W.L.L BUILDING NO 84, PO BOX 24366 NEW INDUSTRIAL AREA, DOHA, QATAR FOR/CONSIGNEE: QATAR DEVELOPMENT BANK, GRAND HAMAD STR., DOHA QATAR Qatar
consignee.invoice_value: FOR/NOTIFY PARTY: ELITE PAPER INDUSTRY W.L.L., BUILDING NO 84, PO BOX 24366, STR 4F, ZONE 81, NEW INDUSTRIAL AREA, DOHA, QATAR FOR/CONSIGNEE: QATAR DEVELOPMENT BANK, GRAND HAMAD STR., DOHA, QATAR
consignee.motivation: Consignee from certificate matches the primary 'Buyer' and 'Consignee' fields in the invoice with the same company names and addresses after allowed normalization. The countries 'Qatar' match exactly. The certificate consignee is found in the invoice's primary billing and consignee fields. Rules 4.2.0, 4.2.2.1 and 4.2.3 support MATCH.

goods_description.certificate_value: 195 UNITS / 1560 BALES SÖDRA BLUE - NORTHERN BLEACHED SOFTWOOD KRAFT PULP (ECF) HS CODE: 470321000000
goods_description.invoice_value: SÖDRA BLUE - NORTHERN BLEACHED SOFTWOOD KRAFT PULP HS Code: 47032100 1560 BALES 395.850 GMT 195 UNITS 390.000 ADMT
goods_description.motivation: Goods description in certificate matches invoice description and HS code (minor format difference in HS code number allowed). Certificate refers explicitly to invoice number and date, enabling use of 4.3.5 for general goods description with invoice reference. Quantities and units (195 units / 1560 bales) correspond exactly. No conflicting goods descriptions found.

quantity.motivation: Quantity of 395.850 Gross Metric Tons in certificate matches invoice total gross weight of 395.850 GMT exactly with allowed normalizations. Certificate quantity includes unit and weight category, confirmed by invoice remarks. Rule 4.4.4 (total weight in invoice) validates this and no discrepancies found.

origin.invoice_value: MADE IN SWEDEN Country of Origin: SWEDEN
origin.motivation: Certificate states origin as European Union and Sweden. Invoice includes explicit origin statement 'MADE IN SWEDEN' and confirms country of origin as Sweden. EU↔Member State normalization (4.5.4.2) applies; Sweden is confirmed member state and explicit origin 'SWEDEN' found. Thus, origin matches.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: Alla kontrollpunkter har identifierats och matchar mellan certifikatet och fakturan med tillåten normalisering. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt utan manuell granskning.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter i certifikatet stämmer överens med fakturan. Avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland är verifierade och överens. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
